name: bing-ads
description: Reads Microsoft Advertising (Bing Ads) accounts, users, campaigns, ad groups, and ads through the v13 Customer Management and Campaign Management REST APIs. Read-only.

risk.read: external Microsoft Advertising REST API read of account/user/campaign/ad-group/ad metadata
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: Tier-3 native package (internal/connectors/native/bing-ads): Check/Catalog/Read are hand-written Go, never routed through engine.Check/engine.Read, so this bundle's streams.json/spec.json exist only to keep identity/spec/docs/schema uniform with every other connector -- conformance's dynamic (fixture-replay) checks exercise the DECLARATIVE engine read path, which this connector never uses. Proven live by internal/connectors/native/bing-ads's own unit tests and internal/connectors/paritytest/bing-ads.
